data.title: Trump says court got it wrong after emergency tariffs ruled illegal
data.description:
A U. S. appeals court on Friday found that most of Donald Trump’s tariffs violate the law, weakening a key piece of the Republican president’s trade strategy. The panel left the levies in place until October 14 so the administration can seek review by the U. S. Supreme Court. Soon after the decision, Trump said in a […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-says-court-got-it-wrong-after-emergency-tariffs-ruled-illegal/

data.title: Germany’s economy sinks again as Sick Man of Europe misses yet another chance to rebound
data.description:
Germany just blew another chance to pull itself out of the ditch. On Friday, new economic data from Destatis showed rising inflation, surging unemployment, and no sign of recovery in sight, as the country braces for the full blowback from Donald Trump’s latest trade squeeze. The inflation rate climbed to 2. 1% in August, beating forecasts […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/germany-economy-sinks-again/

data.title: Former CFTC chairman backs USD stablecoins to replace failed currencies
data.description:

Giancarlo has been vocal about the potential of stablecoins. As far back as 2023, he was urging the government and market participants not to ignore […]

data.title: Shiba Inu Price Set For 650% Expansion To $0.00009 ATH If This Happens
data.description:

The price has been range-bound between $0. 00001345 and $0. 00001190 for much of August, showing low volatility as traders wait for a decisive move
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/shiba-inu/shiba-inu-set-for-650-expansion/

data.title: Crypto crime deprives Ukraine of billions in revenues, report shows
data.description:
Ukraine has been losing billions of U. S. dollars in budget revenues as a result of crimes related to cryptocurrencies, a new report has indicated. Proper crypto oversight can help the war-torn country’s government to recover some $10 billion or more, according to a quoted estimate. Criminals take advantage of Ukraine’s crypto Wild East From corrupt […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-crime-deprives-ukraine-of-billions-in-revenues-report-shows/
